---
description: Keep README in sync whenever project files change
applyTo: '*.md'
---

When editing or adding source files in this repository, update `README.md` with a brief note describing the change and any new usage instructions. This includes:

- New project dependencies (Docker, external libraries, etc.)
- New runtime commands (`docker-compose`, `npm scripts`, etc.)
- New entrypoints or configuration files (e.g., Dockerfile, compose, CI/yaml)

If the change is tiny and documentation is not required, add a one-line note under "Development" or another logical section in `README.md` explaining why no update was needed.
